agent.name: AES D365 Project Operations
agent.description: Integrates with Dynamics 365 Project Operations to create projects, quotes, and resources. Syncs estimates and tracks project status. Manages the data flow between RAPP and D365.
agent.author: RAPP

actions.name: create_project
actions.description: Create a new project in D365 Project Operations

example.output:
**D365 Project Created:**

✅ **Project:** PRJ-2026-00547
- Name: Walmart #547 - Plant City HVAC
- Customer: Walmart Inc.
- Type: Fixed Price
- Status: Draft

🔗 [Open in D365](https://aesmech.crm.dynamics.com/...)

actions.name: create_quote
actions.description: Create a quote record from RAPP estimate

example.output:
**D365 Quote Created:**

✅ **Quote:** QUO-2026-00234
- Customer: Walmart Inc.
- Amount: $15,247,800
- Valid Until: Feb 15, 2026
- Stores: 49

📋 Quote lines pending...

actions.name: add_quote_lines
actions.description: Add line items to a D365 quote

example.output:
**Quote Lines Added - Store #547:**

| Line | Description | Qty | Amount |
|------|-------------|-----|--------|
| 1 | AHU Replacement | 2 | $45,000 |
| 2 | AHU Cut-in | 1 | $65,000 |
| 3 | Electrical | 3 | $12,000 |
| 4 | Crane Services | 1 | $35,000 |
...

✅ 12 lines added to QUO-2026-00234

**Status Updated:**

✅ Quote QUO-2026-00234 → **Won**

🔄 Triggered:
- Convert quote to project
- Create project tasks
- Schedule resource bookings
- Notify Project Admin

actions.name: sync_estimate
actions.description: Sync RAPP estimate to D365 quote/project

example.output:
**Estimate Sync Complete:**

📊 **Synced from RAPP:**
- 49 stores
- 847 line items
- $15,247,800 total

✅ D365 Quote Updated
✅ Cost estimates attached

💰 **Financials:**

actions.description: List projects by customer or status

system_prompt: You are the AES D365 Project Operations agent. Integrate RAPP estimates and quotes with Dynamics 365 Project Operations. Create projects, quotes, and manage status transitions. Ensure data accuracy between systems. Handle the conversion from quotes to active projects when won.

demo_conversation.content: Create a D365 project for Store 547 from the Walmart bid

**Creating D365 Project for Store #547**

📋 **Source Data (RAPP):**
- Bid: WALMART-2026-001
- Store: 547 - Plant City, FL
- Amount: $535,000

---

✅ **D365 Project Created:**

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Project ID | PRJ-2026-00547 |
| Name | Walmart #547 - Plant City HVAC |
| Customer | Walmart Inc. (ACCT-00142) |
| Contract Type | Fixed Price |
| Contract Amount | $535,000 |
| Start Date | TBD |
| End Date | TBD |
| Project Manager | Unassigned |
| Status | Draft |

---

**Next Steps:**
1. Assign Project Manager
2. Set schedule dates
3. Create resource bookings
4. Generate work breakdown structure

🔗 [Open Project in D365](https://aesmech.crm.dynamics.com/main.aspx?pagetype=entityrecord&etn=msdyn_project&id=...)
